title: Verify decompose.enabled=false fallback behavior
description: Verify that when decompose.enabled=false is set in kody.config.json, the @kody decompose command immediately falls back to the normal pipeline without attempting decomposition. Verification: pipeline logs show 'decompose disabled in config — falling back'. This is P3T27 — a test case from the Kody Engine nightly test suite that validates the decompose config flag gates the feature correctly.
existing_patterns: kody.config.json — structured JSON config following kody.config.schema.json with top-level sections (quality, git, github, agent, mcp, devServer, watch)
